description: A new piece of equipment has been installed and a reliability engineer needs to create its preventive maintenance plan from scratch.

nodes.task_description: Create a new asset record for the equipment in the CMMS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the new asset record.

nodes.task_description: Define the individual PM tasks based on the OEM's recommendations (e.g., 'Inspect monthly', 'Replace filter quarterly').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates several new PM tasks with different frequencies.

nodes.task_description: Build the maintenance plan by associating the PM tasks with the new asset.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the full PM plan, and the system generates the first set of due dates.
